ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company associated with the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the company belongs */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry classification of the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial Public Offering date */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date when the stock data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock associated with the price data */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of stocks traded on that day */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Price of the stock during pre-market hours */,
  "after_hours_price" REAL /* Price of the stock during after-hours trading */,
  "price_source" TEXT /* Source of the price data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date when the price data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock associated with the performance metrics */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance record */,
  "rs_rating" REAL /* Relative strength rating of the stock */,
  "rs_rank" REAL /* Relative strength rank of the stock */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in price from the previous day */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in price from the previous day */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta value of the stock */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-Earnings ratio */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings Per Share */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date when the performance data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_performance_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Last date of user activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock for which the alert is set */,
  "alert_condition" TEXT /* Condition to trigger the alert (e.g., price above, price below) */,
  "alert_value" REAL /* Value for the alert condition */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered) */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Last date when the alert was triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
